title: mclient crashes if real column is multiplied by it itself
poc: create table raw.ACCELEROMETER("ID" BIGSERIAL, "RECORDING$ID" INT REFERENCES raw.recording("ID"), "DateTime" TIMESTAMP, "TICK" INT, "X" REAL, "Y" REAL, "Z" REAL);
key_bug_features: Multiplying a REAL column by itself causes crash
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE raw.TEST_TABLE("ID" BIGSERIAL, "VALUE" REAL, "DESCRIPTION" TEXT);
SELECT "VALUE" * "VALUE" FROM raw.TEST_TABLE WHERE "VALUE" IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;
